goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'west'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee'.
You are also looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'kohinoor'.
Make sure you get 'food type' and 'price range'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
